title: Network Packet Flow Visualizer
description: A premium dark-laboratory telemetry dashboard animating network packet flows across a 4-node topology (Client → Router → Server → Database) using native HTML5 Canvas with LERP-driven particle kinematics. Features 3 preset transmission profiles, real-time stochastic packet drop simulation, link breakdown with auto-recovery, typewriter log output, and localStorage-persisted telemetry.
